falsification_blocks.target_claim: family-patch separation is preserved in brain-side projection
falsification_blocks.failure_condition: cross-family mixing rises to same-family overlap level

falsification_blocks.target_claim: attribute gradients remain local chart directions rather than arbitrary labels
falsification_blocks.failure_condition: attribute structure cannot be read as patch-local gradients

falsification_blocks.target_claim: relation reasoning stays family-anchored instead of becoming a free symbolic role layer
falsification_blocks.failure_condition: family anchoring disappears while relation performance remains high

falsification_blocks.target_claim: guarded-write and stable-read asymmetry is a real part of the coding system
falsification_blocks.failure_condition: stress perturbation does not narrow write before concept collapse

falsification_blocks.target_claim: modality-conditioned entry into a family-conditioned shared reasoning slice
falsification_blocks.failure_condition: a fully shared global loop outperforms conditioned-entry shared-slice explanations

verdict.core_answer: P4 now has a concrete causal falsification bundle built from executed probes plus ICSPB and reasoning-slice predictions.
verdict.next_engineering_target: run the next brain-side round as intervention tests against these five falsification blocks rather than as generic probe collection.
